ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the parameter */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Condition under which the parameter applies */,
  "applicability_id" INTEGER /* Applicability of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "reference_document" TEXT /* Reference to the document or datasheet where the parameter is defined */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance value for the parameter */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test the parameter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_applicability_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicability_id") REFERENCES applicabilities ("applicability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  "base_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base unit if this unit is a derived unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to the base unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_base_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the condition */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the condition */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity for the condition */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicabilities" (
  "applicability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicability */,
  "applicability_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the applicability */,
  "min_voltage" REAL /* Minimum voltage for the applicability */,
  "max_voltage" REAL /* Maximum voltage for the applicability */,
  "min_current" REAL /* Minimum current for the applicability */,
  "max_current" REAL /* Maximum current for the applicability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level or permission level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)
